div.h2: OS Virtual Memory Management - Page Replacement Logic

ul.li: Hardware Support: Requires 1-bit hardware 'Accessed' flag in PTE.
Behavior: Approximates LRU (Least Recently Used) via a single-pass circular sweep.

g.text: Intel x86-64 Page Table Entry (4KB Page Mapping)

g.title: Recently accessed. Will be skipped but REF bit will be reset.
Not accessed since last sweep. Primary candidate for eviction.

div.p: Overflow Handling: All pages were recently used. Selection falls back to cursor to guarantee completion.

g.title: Recently accessed. Will be skipped but REF bit will be reset.
Not accessed since last sweep. Primary candidate for eviction.
